title: Those whom Ziyad sent to Mu°awiyah
description: 11361 I iujr b. 'Adi b. Jabalah al -Kindi, al-Argam b. 'Abdallah al-Kindi from the Banu al -Arqam, Sharik b. Shaddad al-Hadrami, Sayfi b. Fasil, Qabisah b. Dubay' ah b. Harmalah al-'Absi, Karim b. 'Afif al-Khath' ami from the Banu 'Amir b. Shahran (then from Quhafah), 'Asim b. 'Awf al- Bajali, Warga' b. Sumayy al -Bajali, Kidam b. Hayyan and 'Abd al-Rahman b. Hassan both of the 'Anazah from the Banu Humaym, Muhriz b. Shihab al-Tamimi 460. See YAqut, Mu'jam, IV, 488.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
